content.text: I'll read all four frames first.
[Image: original 1280x3861, displayed at 663x2000. Multiply coordinates by 1.93 to map to original image.]

[{"ruleId":"V20","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Candidates/lists wear periwinkle blue in both media: video-01 numbers (0.90/0.80) and video-03 'you'/'the role' bars are periwinkle, matching the periwinkle candidate arrows in page-01. Scores/params/meter wear lilac purple in both: video-01 'score 0.86', video-02 semicircle meter, video-03 fit-score gauge & '76' are lilac, matching page-01 c1-c4 bars and values (0.34/0.94). Probe is amber in video-02 (orange needle) and matches the amber probe arrow in page-01. Text is warm cream in both.","suggestion":""},{"ruleId":"V21","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Only Night School palette colors appear: deep navy background, warm cream text/values, periwinkle blue data/candidates, lilac purple params/meter, amber probe, mint green 'NIGHT SCHOOL' heading in page-01. No out-of-palette saturated primary red/green/blue seen in video-01/02/03 or page-01.","suggestion":""},{"ruleId":"V22","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Video frames (video-01/02/03) and page-01 share the same deep-navy background, warm-cream serif/mono typographic temperature, and identical token palette; they read as one product family with no jarring stylistic mismatch.","suggestion":""}]
